title: Make the content-type registry independent of static initialization order
prompt: The content-type lookup is populated by a registrar in a different translation unit from the registry storage. The protected test compiles the sources once and links the same object files in two controlled orders. One order currently loses every built-in registration before main. Repair the registry's lifetime so both link orders expose the same existing lookup behavior. Keep the public lookup API and its results unchanged; do not hard-code the protected probe's output or modify the tests.
